title: Increase state_store coverage
summary: Add targeted tests to lift state_store.py coverage to >=95%, covering remaining validation branches and helper behavior.
acceptance_criteria: New tests cover missing branches in tx event payload validation.
New tests cover tx event invariant checks and helper utilities.

steps.description: Identify untested branches and add focused unit tests.
Add event invariant and payload validation tests to hit edge cases.
Run coverage and confirm the threshold is met.

notes: Prefer minimal, deterministic tests with clear error assertions.
